component.name: rtwpriv
component.description: Realtek WiFi RF HW/SW Tx testing utility for mass production line RF calibration and regulatory (FCC/CE/MKK) certification testing.

license.name: GNU General Public License v2.0 only

components.name: glibc
components.description: GNU C Library - provides libc (stdio, stdlib, string, errno, ctype, math, etc.)

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1 only

methods.value: Runtime library required by g++ toolchain (libc). Resolved from #include <stdio.h>, <stdlib.h>, <string.h>, <errno.h>, <ctype.h>, <math.h>, <assert.h>, <unistd.h>, <stdint.h>, <stddef.h>

components.name: libm
components.description: GNU C Library math library - linked via -lm

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1 only

methods.value: Explicitly linked via -lm in Makefile. Resolved from #include <math.h> in rtwpriv.h

components.name: libstdc++
components.description: GNU Standard C++ Library - required as compiler is g++ (C++)

license.name: GNU General Public License v3.0 with GCC Runtime Library Exception

methods.value: Compiler set to 'g++' (C++ compiler) in Makefile. C++ features used: class (struct with methods implicit), cstdint, cctype headers

components.name: Linux Kernel Userspace Headers (netlink)
components.description: Kernel netlink and wireless headers - provides linux/netlink.h, linux/genetlink.h, linux/sockios.h, linux/wireless.h

license.name: GNU General Public License v2.0 only

methods.value: Resolved from #include <linux/netlink.h>, <linux/genetlink.h>, <linux/sockios.h>, <linux/wireless.h> in rtw_nl.cpp and rtwpriv.h

components.name: Linux Kernel WHC Netlink Driver (whc_demo)
components.description: WHC Demo Generic Netlink family driver - runtime peer that implements the 'whc_demo' Generic Netlink family. Required at runtime, not linked at build time.

license.name: GNU General Public License v2.0 only

methods.value: Resolved from rtw_nl.cpp #define WHC_CMD_GENL_NAME "whc_demo" and use of GENL_ID_CTRL to resolve family ID at runtime

components.name: POSIX Socket API
components.description: POSIX networking and system interfaces - provides sys/socket.h, sys/ioctl.h, netinet/in.h, arpa/inet.h, sys/time.h, sys/wait.h

license.name: GNU Lesser General Public License v2.1 only

components.name: gcc (GNU C Compiler / g++)
components.description: GNU C/C++ Compiler toolchain used to build rtwpriv

license.name: GNU General Public License v3.0 with GCC Runtime Library Exception

methods.value: Resolved from Makefile: CC = g++, CFLAGS = -g -Wall -static
